text: The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Raab Rd, to the South by Fort Jesse Rd, to the East by Airport Rd, and to the West by Hershey Rd. The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Normal, IL. It is a single family detached two story traditional style house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment.
